REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RONALD GAGGERO, JACQUELINE GAGGERO NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTION OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PARAGRAPH 19(V), APPEARING ON PAGE 5, LINES 26 THROUGH 28, IS IRRELEVANT, IMPROPER, AND IS STRICKEN FROM THE COMPLAINT. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT THE CURRENT COMPLAINT MAY CONSTITUTE A VIOLATION OF SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE 37.10B. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION TO JUDICIAL NOTICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO THE COURT. (SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE, RULE 2.7(B).) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RONALD GAGGERO, JACQUELINE GAGGERO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint is GRANTED. Paragraph 19(v), appearing on page 5, lines 26 through 28, is irrelevant, improper, and is stricken from the complaint. The Court also notes that the current complaint may constitute a violation of San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.10B. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is granted. No opposition to Judicial Notice. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition to the Court. (San Francisco Local Rule, Rule 2.7(B).) Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
